name: @zetesis/quartz-okf
description: OKF semantics for Quartz: frontmatter validation, type index tags, typed topology edges and a machine-readable knowledge graph

profile.description: Consumer profile overlay merged onto the reference profile

strict.description: Fail the build on OKF conformance errors (invalid type, folder note without alias)

types.description: Closed set of allowed frontmatter types

edgeLabels.description: Closed set of allowed Topology edge labels (violations warn, never fail)

injectTypeTag.description: Inject a derived type/<type> tag so tag pages act as per-type indexes

typeTagPrefix.description: Prefix for the derived type tag

requireFolderNoteAlias.description: Require folder notes (<dir>/<dir>.md) to declare an alias equal to their name

emitGraph.description: Emit the typed knowledge graph JSON

graphOutput.description: Output path (relative to the site root) for the knowledge graph JSON

emitRaw.description: Emit source markdown alongside the rendered site

topologyHeading.description: Heading text of the section holding typed edges
